message:
Merge PR #2643: fix(dolt): normalize backslashes in config.yaml on Windows

Windows portability fix: uses filepath.ToSlash() for data_dir in config.yaml and adds TCP fallback for IsRunning on Windows.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2643
Author: ronneylira

files.patch:
@@ -3697,7 +3697,7 @@ func TestWriteServerConfig_Defaults(t *testing.T) {
 		"max_connections: 1000",
 		fmt.Sprintf("read_timeout_millis: %d", DefaultReadTimeoutMs),
 		fmt.Sprintf("write_timeout_millis: %d", DefaultWriteTimeoutMs),
-		"data_dir: \"" + dir + "\"",
+		"data_dir: \"" + filepath.ToSlash(dir) + "\"",
 		"log_level: warning",
 		"auto_gc_behavior:",
 	}
